notes:
Pre-launch readiness patch across the marketing landing page and the dashboard. Wires up the previously-fake waitlist form, ships brand-coherent legal pages from the public site, unifies the brand accent on green (#37AA35), corrects honest-claim issues on latency and engine size, swaps the now-defunct MyForexFunds preset for Apex Trader Funding, and tightens product naming on "ASA Terminal" everywhere a user can see it.

### P0 ‚Äî must-fix before showing to users

- **Wired the waitlist form** (`marketing/landing/index.html`, `marketing/landing/scripts.js`, `server.py`, `database.py`, `email_service.py`). The landing page form previously faked success without persisting anything. v1.0.51 adds a `POST /api/waitlist` endpoint that validates the email, persists `email`/`name`/`tier`/`ip`/`created_at` to a new `waitlist_signups` table (`UNIQUE(email)`), is rate-limited per IP, and is exempt from the `/api/*` JWT gate + Origin CSRF check (it's a public form on the marketing site). Confirmation mail goes via `email_service.send_waitlist_confirmation` when Resend is configured. The frontend now POSTs JSON, surfaces a real inline error on failure, and disables the submit button while in flight.
- **Smart quotes in the founder section** (`marketing/landing/index.html` lines 622‚Äì626). Curly `‚Äù` characters had broken into the `class=`/`id=` attribute parser, leaving the founder copy unstyled. Replaced with straight ASCII double-quotes; surrounding founder paragraphs now render with their intended typography.
- **Brand accent unified to #37AA35** across `static/css/tokens.css`, `static/css/components.css`, `templates/login.html`, `templates/onboarding.html`, `templates/admin.html`, `dashboard.html`, `email_service.py`, and the legal-accept gate inline CSS in `server.py`. Dark-theme `--accent`, `--accent-hover` (`#2d9130`), `--accent-muted` (`rgba(55,170,53,0.15)`), `--accent-dim`, `--accent-glow`, and the chart-line accent all flip to the brand green; the light-theme block follows with a principled lighter variant (same hue family, no more orphan teal). Stale teal `rgba(0,212,170,...)` references in inline styles in `dashboard.html` were also fixed.
- **Public legal pages** (`server.py`). The marketing landing page links to `/privacy/`, `/terms/`, `/risk/`, which previously 404'd. v1.0.51 renders the existing `legal/privacy-policy.md` / `terms-of-service.md` / `risk-disclosure.md` content via a brand-template page (dark canvas, ASA wordmark sticky header, brand-green accent, brand-green dot logo, footer cross-links). The `/legal/<slug>` URLs the dashboard already uses now share the same renderer so styling is consistent.
- **OG cover + webmanifest** (`marketing/landing/assets/og-cover.png`, `marketing/landing/site.webmanifest`, `scripts/build_og_cover.py`). The 1200√ó630 OG image is generated by a small repeatable script: dark `#0d0d0d` canvas, ASA wordmark mid-left from `static/branding/wordmark-tight-on-dark.png`, "Execute. / Attribute. / Decide with data." right-aligned, brand-green accent bar along the bottom, faint upper-left brand-green glow. The webmanifest declares `name`, `short_name`, `theme_color: #37AA35`, `background_color: #0d0d0d`, and a stack of icon sizes ‚Äî fixes the previously-broken `<link rel="manifest">`.

### P1 ‚Äî pre-launch polish

- **Removed the fake waitlist counter.** `marketing/landing/index.html`'s "847 traders on the waitlist" element and `scripts.js`'s `initWaitlistCounter` IIFE are gone. Replaced visually with a static "Limited early access spots available." line so there's no layout shift.
- **Product name standardised on "ASA Terminal."** Updated `<title>`, OG `og:site_name` + `og:title` + `twitter:title`, JSON-LD `Organization.name` and `SoftwareApplication.name` ("ASA" ‚Üí "ASA Terminal"), `Product.name` ("ASA Pro" ‚Üí "ASA Terminal Pro"), and the nav/footer brand `aria-label`/`alt`. `templates/login.html` and `templates/onboarding.html` `<title>` now read just "ASA Terminal" (no "‚Äî Login" / "‚Äî Setup" suffix). `dashboard.html`'s `<title>` was "ASA Trading Systems Terminal" ‚Äî now "ASA Terminal".
- **Latency contradictions fixed.** Hero kicker now reads `TELEGRAM ‚Üí MT5 ¬∑ <20MS SIGNAL PROCESSING ¬∑ ~200MS END-TO-END ¬∑ NO VPS` so the `<20ms` claim and the `~200ms` flow-diagram caption agree on what they're measuring.
- **Dashboard version labels.** Sidebar "V8.5" ‚Üí "v1.0.51"; Docs header "System Documentation ¬∑ V8.5" ‚Üí "ASA Terminal Docs"; Docs footer "ASA Terminal V8.0 ... Engine: Python (~5,300 lines) ... 21 DB tables ... 205 tests" trimmed to "ASA Terminal" (no fabricated counts); CSS query strings `?v=8.2.4` ‚Üí `?v=1.0.51`.
- **Removed wrong engine size claims.** "~2900 lines" (engine.py blurb) and "~5,300 lines" (file-tree section + footer) deleted from the user-facing docs view in `dashboard.html`. The surrounding context is preserved.
- **"Stealth Execution" renamed to "Execution Variance"** in `dashboard.html` (Prop Firm view). Description rewritten from "Randomize execution to avoid bot detection" to "Add natural timing variance to order submission for realistic execution simulation and latency testing." The toggles and underlying engine config keys (`stealth_*`) are unchanged ‚Äî this is a copy-only fix.
- **MyForexFunds replaced with Apex Trader Funding.** The MFF preset button on the Prop Firm Quick Presets is now Apex (`apex` preset key, `Apex Trader Funding` label, no fixed profit target / 3% daily / 5% trailing drawdown / 7-day minimum). Removed an MFF reference from the DXTrade docs blurb. Engine preset key `mff` was replaced wholesale with `apex` in `engine.py`'s `PROP_FIRM_PRESETS`. Landing page risk-gates copy: "...FTMO, FundingPips, TFT, Apex Trader Funding wired in..."
- **AI insight empty state.** When the AI backend isn't configured, the Overview's AI Insight card now surfaces "Set up your AI provider in Settings ‚Üí AI Coach to enable real-time market analysis." with a deeplink button into Settings ‚Üí AI tab, instead of the generic "Click refresh..." hint. `requestQuickInsight` swaps to the empty state on 404/error/empty-response.
- **First-run welcome banner.** New dismissable banner on Overview: "Welcome to ASA Terminal ‚Äî Connect your MT5 broker in Connections ‚Üí then watch your first signal arrive automatically." with a `Connect now ‚Üí` CTA that navigates to the Connections view. Persists dismissal in `localStorage` under `asa_welcomed_v1` so returning users don't see it.
- **"Founder pricing ¬∑ locks in at launch"** sub-line under each price (Starter / Pro / Elite) on the marketing landing page, with a small brand-green leading dot. Shares an existing `.tier__price` block ‚Äî drops directly under the ¬£-amount.
- **Onboarding: cTrader / DXTrade / TradeLocker badged "Coming soon."** The broker selection cards in `templates/onboarding.html` now carry a `data-coming-soon="1"` attribute, get visually muted, and display a "Coming soon" badge in the corner. MT5 stays selectable. Landing page hero kicker line also qualified: "MT5 live ¬∑ cTrader coming soon" (was the bare "MT5 ¬∑ cTrader").
- **Mobile hero chart no longer hidden.** `styles.css` ‚â§960px breakpoint now keeps `.hero-chart` visible at `transform: scale(0.78)` with `overflow: hidden` so the live candle visual still anchors the hero on mobile.

### P2 ‚Äî nice-to-haves

- **Mobile nav menu (hamburger).** Added a `.nav__burger` button that surfaces at ‚â§960px and toggles a full-width `.nav__mobile` dropdown listing the same five primary links plus a brand-green CTA pill. CSS-only animation on the burger lines (rotate to √ó). Closes on link-tap and on resize past the breakpoint.
- **JSON-LD `foundingDate`.** Removed the `"foundingDate": "2026"` claim from the marketing JSON-LD `Organization` block ‚Äî the actual incorporation date is unknown to this codebase, so leaving it absent is honest. Schema validators don't require it.
- **README badge.** `README.md`'s shields.io version badge bumped from `1.0.30` to `1.0.51`.
- **Testimonials.** Replaced `James K. ¬∑ London` / `Riya M. ¬∑ Singapore` / `Tom A. ¬∑ Dubai` with anonymised but specific descriptors ("FTMO challenge passer ¬∑ moved from manual copy to ASA after missing 3 entries in one session ¬∑ passed 2 challenges in 90 days", etc.). Pre-launch we don't have real attributable customer names ‚Äî these read as user vignettes rather than fake first names.
- **Light-theme accent.** `[data-theme="light"]` block in `static/css/tokens.css` no longer carries `#00b894` teal. Now `#37AA35` base + `#2d9130` hover for parity with the dark-theme tokens.
- **Footer risk warning.** Replaced the stale "74‚Äì89% of retail accounts lose money" CFD-broker-style line with a cleaner, more honest "Trading involves substantial risk of loss. ASA Terminal provides software tools only, not investment advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results."

### Files touched

- `marketing/landing/index.html` ‚Äî hero kicker, smart-quote fix, OG/title/JSON-LD, waitlist form id, founder-pricing notes, broker-list copy, mobile burger markup, testimonial copy, footer risk warning, fake counter removed
- `marketing/landing/scripts.js` ‚Äî waitlist form posts to `/api/waitlist`, mobile menu toggle, fake counter removed
- `marketing/landing/styles.css` ‚Äî `.price-note`, hamburger + mobile dropdown styles, mobile hero chart visible
- `marketing/landing/site.webmanifest` ‚Äî created
- `marketing/landing/assets/og-cover.png` ‚Äî generated (1200√ó630)
- `scripts/build_og_cover.py` ‚Äî created (repeatable PIL pipeline for the OG cover)
- `static/css/tokens.css`, `static/css/components.css` ‚Äî `--accent` flipped to `#37AA35` everywhere; light-theme accent fixed
- `dashboard.html` ‚Äî version stamps `v1.0.51`, "ASA Terminal Docs" header, footer trimmed, V8.0 stamps removed from user-facing docs, Stealth ‚Üí Execution Variance, Apex preset button, MFF removed from DXTrade blurb, AI insight empty state + Settings deeplink, first-run welcome banner, stale rgba teal references in inline styles fixed
- `templates/login.html`, `templates/onboarding.html`, `templates/admin.html` ‚Äî accent tokens flipped, titles standardised, broker cards badged "Coming soon"
- `server.py` ‚Äî `/api/waitlist` POST handler, public `/privacy/`, `/terms/`, `/risk/` aliases on `_render_legal_page`, brand-template legal page styling, exempt waitlist from CSRF + JWT gates, accent recolours in legal-accept gate inline CSS
- `database.py` ‚Äî `waitlist_signups` table + `add_waitlist_signup` helper; trade-tag default colour `#37AA35`
- `email_service.py` ‚Äî `send_waitlist_confirmation` added; brand-green palette across all transactional templates
- `engine.py` ‚Äî `PROP_FIRM_PRESETS["mff"]` replaced with `["apex"]` (Apex Trader Funding)
- `README.md` ‚Äî version badge bumped
- `CHANGELOG.md` ‚Äî this entry
